title: E5: fabric-hint Signal A upgrade (24h-OR-20-edits via edit-counter sidecar)
description: Upgrade fabric-hint Signal A. Reads .fabric/.cache/edit-counter (created by E4 in TASK-020), counts lines since last knowledge_proposed event ts. Trigger condition: 20 lines OR 24h elapsed since last knowledge_proposed event, whichever first. Threshold archive_edit_threshold (default 20) configurable in fabric-config.json. Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for E5.

files.change: Replace pure 24h check (TASK-015) with combined: read edit-counter line count since last knowledge_proposed ts; trigger on >=archive_edit_threshold lines OR >=24h elapsed

implementation: Locate last knowledge_proposed event ts from events.jsonl tail
Read .fabric/.cache/edit-counter; parse each line as timestamp; count lines with ts > last_knowledge_proposed_ts
Trigger Signal A if (line_count >= archive_edit_threshold) OR (Date.now() - last_knowledge_proposed_ts >= 24*60*60*1000)
Update fabric-config schema in shared package: add archive_edit_threshold: z.number().int().positive().default(20)
Smoke test: synthesize edit-counter with 19 recent lines + recent knowledge_proposed (no trigger); add 1 more line → trigger; or wait 24h with no edits → trigger

reference.pattern: Hook signal upgrade with config-driven threshold

criteria: fabric-hint.cjs Signal A upgraded: reads edit-counter, counts lines since last knowledge_proposed event ts, triggers on 20 lines OR 24h elapsed (whichever first)
Threshold configurable per project via fabric-config.json

rationale.chosen_approach: OR-combined edit-count + time signal; sidecar from E4 provides the edit count source
decision_factors: OR semantics catch both 'lots of activity, few hours' and 'few edits, long gap' patterns
Time fallback ensures Signal A fires for low-activity users
rationale.tradeoffs: May fire more often than pure-time signal; acceptable given recommended_skill is suggestion not action

manual_checks: Synthesize 20 lines in edit-counter post last knowledge_proposed → Signal A fires
Synthesize 19 lines + 25h gap → Signal A fires (time path)
Synthesize 5 lines + 5h gap → Signal A silent

risks.description: edit-counter file absent (TASK-020 not yet run on user repo)
risks.mitigation: Treat absent file as 0 lines; document in SKILL hint
